topic_text: When Nest set to Home from Nest Thermostat, do Change camera mode using Withings Home. When I'm home, stop monitoring.. When your Nest thermostat switches to "Home", Withings Home automatically adjusts to stop active monitoring.

When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. If Nest thermostat set to away then turn off wemo switch. Get your Nest thermostat to turn off a wemo switch when away mode is enabled.
When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. If Nest away turn off Wemo Switch. Set your wemo switches to automatically change to off state when your nest is away.

When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Turn off a group of lights using WeMo Lighting. If Nest is set to away turn off a group of lights. You can automatically turn off your lights when no one is home

When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Switch on using SmartThings. If I leave the house, turn on my porch light.. Use your Nest thermostat presence sensor to determine that you've gone, and allow your Smart Things hub to turn on your GE Link lights.
When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Activate shortcut using Wink: Shortcuts. Lights Off if Nest is Away. Turns the lights out (using Wink shortcuts) if Nest Thermostat sets to Away.

When Nest set to Home from Nest Thermostat, do Change camera mode using Withings Home. When I'm home, stop monitoring.. When your Nest thermostat switches to "Home", Withings Home automatically adjusts to stop active monitoring.

When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Change camera mode using Withings Home. Turn on your camera when your Nest Thermostat is set to Away. When your Nest Thermostat is set to Away mode, your Withings Home will automatically turn on and start recording.

When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. If Nest set to Away, turn off WeMo Switch. Choose which home the Nest thermostat is for, and also which WeMo switch you would like turned off when Nest is switched to away.

When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn off the Wemo switch the Iron is plugged into When Nest is set to Away. At least one a week, I get a text from my wife asking me to check to see if she turned off her flat iron I don't know why we can't just get one with an auto off feature - but her hair needs a lot of ironing, and apparently this is the best one :-)  First, I set up an IOS location trigger to tell Nest to go to away mode whenever she leaves the house, and this recipe triggers the Wemo switch her iron is connected to in order to shut it off at that time I also added a notification to my iPhone whenever this runs, so that I don't freeze when she goes to the grocery store on a Saturday.

When Nest set to Away from Nest Thermostat, do Turn off a group of lights using WeMo Lighting. If Nest is set to away turn off a group of lights. You can automatically turn off your lights when no one is home

When Temperature drops below from Nest Thermostat, do Turn off using WeMo Light Switch. Cool Enough, turn off the fan.. Our whole house fan can really bring the temperature of the house down in the evening..sometimes too muchTurn off the fan if the temperature drops below 70 deg F.
